_comment_for_humans: Each entry below is one blog post. The 'slug' must match the filename inside the blogs/ folder (without the .html). To add a new post: copy blogs/_template.html to blogs/your-slug.html, edit the content, then add a new entry to the 'posts' array below. Newest posts appear first automatically (sorted by 'date'). See HOW_TO_ADD_A_BLOG.md for the full walkthrough.

posts.title: How to choose the right type of umbrella for lasting protection
posts.excerpt: Choosing the right umbrella is not just about size or style. From Tank Chhap by BSC Umbrellas to foldables, family umbrellas, and monsoon essentials, here is how to choose the right umbrella for your needs, weather, and daily life.
tags: How to buy the correct Umbrella

posts.title: Three habits that make your umbrella last three monsoons
posts.excerpt: Most umbrellas don't fail from rough use — they fail from how they're put away. Three small habits that turn a single-season buy into a five-year companion.
